title: Fibonacci Number
hints: The Fibonacci sequence starts with f(0) = 0 and f(1) = 1.
For any n >= 2, f(n) = f(n-1) + f(n-2).
Use dynamic programming to avoid recalculating the same subproblems.
Handle base cases: A = 0 returns 0, A = 1 returns 1.
Build the solution bottom-up using an array to store previously computed values.
